title: Project Foundation
summary: Complete foundation implementation with HTML structure, CSS grid layout, game state management, win/draw detection, localStorage integration, and comprehensive E2E test coverage (95/95 tests passing)
details: Created single HTML file with embedded CSS and JavaScript sections
Implemented CSS Grid 3x3 board layout with styled cells and dark theme
Added game state management with turn tracking, win detection (8 winning lines), and draw detection
Implemented cell click handlers with turn alternation and occupied cell protection
Added new game reset functionality
Integrated localStorage for score persistence with error handling
Added npm scripts for typecheck, build, lint, and test
Created comprehensive E2E test suite with Playwright (95 tests, 100% passing)
Verified all P0 requirements and edge cases handled

title: Single Player vs AI
summary: Complete AI opponent implementation with 3-button mode selection (Play as X, Play as O, Local). AI uses priority-based strategy: win > block > center > corner > any. Includes 300ms response delay, click guard protection, and comprehensive E2E test coverage (145/145 tests passing)
details: Added 3-button mode selection UI (Play as X vs AI, Play as O vs AI, vs Player local)
Extended game state with mode, playerSymbol, and aiSymbol tracking
Implemented AI logic with priority-based move selection (win/block/center/corner/any)
Added AI auto-response after player moves with 300ms delay for natural feel
Implemented click guard at top of handleCellClick to prevent player hijacking AI turn
Added AI first move logic in resetGame when player chooses O
Created 31 AI integration tests covering logic, game flow, and edge cases
Created 19 E2E user journey tests covering complete gameplay scenarios
Added Change Mode button for navigation back to mode selection
Updated all existing P0 tests to work with mode selection flow

title: Score Tracking
summary: Complete score tracking with separate single-player and multiplayer tracking, UI display, localStorage persistence, and reset functionality (186/186 tests passing - 100%)
details: Updated score structure with xWins/oWins for multiplayer mode (was wins/losses/draws)
Added score display HTML with mode-specific visibility (sp-scores for AI, mp-scores for local)
Added CSS styling with color-coded scores (green=wins, red=losses for SP; red=X, green=O for MP)
Implemented updateScoreDisplay() function called on mode changes and page load
Implemented recordScore() function integrated into game over detection in handleCellClick
Added Reset Scores button in controls area with resetScores() function
Score persistence via localStorage with error handling and structure migration
Comprehensive E2E test coverage with 23 integration tests covering all functionality
Created 18 E2E user journey tests covering 6 major user scenarios from user perspective
Fixed 4 localStorage persistence test regressions from score structure change
All 186 tests passing (100%) including 41 tests specifically for P2 Score Tracking
